name: @mis-plugins/sql-inventory-validator
description: v2.2.0-rc1 phase 4.8 (sql-inventory) 11 컬럼 + v2.3.0-rc1 migration_priority 12번째 컬럼 (P0~P3 / ADR-CHAIN-009) + v2.3.1 PATCH baseline ratchet (auto_ratio trend / C-v2.2.0-2) + dynamic_branch.tag_type enum (iBATIS 2 + MyBatis 3 + sql / C-v2.2.0-7) + v8.7 PATCH Layer 2 legacy XML cross-check (xmllint XPath count vs inventory_count) + Layer 3 evidence cross-check (--evidence-dir / R15 silent enabler 차단) + v8.7.1 PATCH xmllint XPath 에 //procedure 추가 (F-CYCLE4-001 fix / iBATIS 2 stored procedure mapper 대응) + v8.13.0 MINOR — Tier 1 in-plugin XML parser 격상 (xmllint → fast-xml-parser / R19 DEC-2026-05-18-runtime-tool-exclusion paradigm 정합 / Windows/Linux/Mac 동일 동작 / C-xmllint-env-absent carry 종결). workspace 14번째. v8.7 rename from sql-inventory-extractor (실 동작 = validator / 옛 명 = extractor / bin alias 양쪽 보존).
